next_steps: Perform urgent neuroimaging with CT venography or MRI/MR venography to evaluate for venous sinus thrombosis
Consult ophthalmology for slit-lamp examination and formal fundoscopy to rule out papilledema or ischemic optic neuropathy
Obtain inflammatory markers (ESR and CRP) to investigate giant-cell arteritis
Perform lumbar puncture for opening pressure and CSF analysis (cytology, protein, glucose, culture) after neuroimaging
Review and streamline neuro-active medications to avoid masking neurological progression
